User.title: User
User.description: User profile document containing authentication and profile details.

displayName.description: The custom username selected by the user.

passwordHash.description: The SHA-256 hash of the active password (for validating previous/deactivated passwords).

deactivatedPasswords.description: Array of SHA-256 hashes of previous/deactivated passwords.

users/{userId}.description: A collection containing user profile documents keyed by Firebase Auth UID.
